ddls:
CREATE TABLE "celestial_objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each celestial object */,
  "ra_hours" INTEGER /* Right Ascension in hours */,
  "ra_minutes" INTEGER /* Right Ascension in minutes */,
  "ra_seconds" REAL /* Right Ascension in seconds */,
  "dec_degrees" INTEGER /* Declination in degrees */,
  "dec_minutes" INTEGER /* Declination in minutes */,
  "dec_seconds" INTEGER /* Declination in seconds */,
  "magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the object */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of celestial object */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from Earth in light-years */,
  "spectral_type" TEXT /* Spectral type of the object */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Surface temperature of the object */,
  "luminosity" REAL /* Luminosity of the object */,
  "radius" REAL /* Radius of the object */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the object */,
  "discovery_date" TEXT /* Date of discovery */,
  "discovered_by" TEXT /* Name of the discoverer */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the celestial_objects table */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the observation */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the instruments table */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the users table */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the observational data */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the data file containing the observation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of instrument */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the roles table */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the celestial_objects table */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the users table */,
  "changes" TEXT /* JSON array of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
